code: import authReducer from"./auth-reducer";import userReducer from"./user-reducer";import categoryReducer from"./category-reducer";import orderReducer from"./order-reducer";import productReducer from"./product-reducer";import pageReducer from"./page-reducer";import{combineReducers}from"redux";var rootReducer=combineReducers({auth:authReducer,user:userReducer,product:productReducer,order:orderReducer,category:categoryReducer,page:pageReducer});export default rootReducer;
